headline: Stop the gain—lock in discipline today
summary: You're gaining weight when you need to lose 0.67 kg/week; today, use Huel portions and one exercise session to reverse this trend.
details: Eat only planned vegan meals and Huel pre-portioned shakes today—no emotional snacking allowed; this is your daily anchor against weekend weakness. Put 45 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill today, non-negotiable. Today matters because you're +0.1 kg this week when you should be -0.67 kg; Tuesday is your reset day to build momentum before the weekend when you historically lose discipline.
